examples: A major reason why many cancers are so dangerous is that they metastasize.
"Those are the ones you want to catch," she said, "because they could metastasize and prove lethal."
Younger women have fewer treatment options, she said. "Those types of breast cancer tend to metastasize (spread) early."
But when they metastasize and move into the body, invading bone, patients face an excruciatingly painful decline.
Faced with a small but significant insurgency, American commanders employed a strategy that insured that it would metastasize.
